title: OpenWork brand kit config
description: Single source of truth a distributor edits to rebrand OpenWork. Consumed by scripts/brandkit/apply.mjs at build time. Nothing here is committed into upstream-tracked source files.

features.description: Per-group toggles for the brand kit's override features. Everything defaults to true; set a key to false to leave that surface stock. On apply, a disabled group's working-tree edits are reset and its generated files removed.

brandName.description: Replace the standalone word 'OpenWork' with brand.name in UI strings, window title, and locales.

accentColor.description: Apply brand.accentColor as the default UI accent.

assets.description: Overwrite logo/favicon/desktop-icon files with the ones in brand.assets.

desktopIdentity.description: Rewrite electron-builder appId/productName and the deep-link scheme.

providers.description: Generate opencode.json with the default model and (when wired) filter the provider picker to providers.allowed.

welcomeOverride.description: Generate the brand-owned welcome page + vite.brandkit.config.mts reroute.

cloudHide.description: Master switch for the cloud-hiding ops. Effective only when cloud.hide is also true.

language.description: Master switch for the single-language variant ops. Effective only for a non-English build (language.default or BRANDKIT_LANG).

Single-language variant. A non-'en' default builds a hard-locked edition: that locale is forced on every launch and the Appearance language switcher is hidden. Overridable at build time with the BRANDKIT_LANG env var, so one checkout can emit both an English and a localized installer.

default.description: Locale id matching a file in apps/app/src/i18n/locales (e.g. 'zh'). 'en' = normal multi-language app.

name.description: User-facing product name. Replaces the standalone word 'OpenWork' in UI strings, window title, and packaged app name.

shortName.description: Optional short name for tight spaces. Defaults to `name`.

accentColor.description: Radix color family used as the UI accent (maps to --dls-accent* CSS vars).

assets.description: Repo-relative paths to the distributor's brand assets. Missing files are skipped with a warning so a first run still succeeds.

appId.description: Reverse-DNS bundle id for the packaged app (electron-builder appId).

deepLinkScheme.description: Custom URL scheme for deep links (replaces 'openwork'). Lowercase, no ':' or '//'.

providers.description: Which LLM providers the distributor allows. End users still enter their own API key.

allowed.description: OpenCode provider ids to expose (e.g. 'openrouter', 'anthropic', 'openai'). Others are hidden from the picker.

hide.description: Hide all OpenWork Cloud / Den surfaces (cloud settings group, sign-in entry points, workers).

requireSignin.description: Whether to force account sign-in. Brand-kit default is false.

welcome.description: Content for the brand-owned welcome page. Generated into brand/overrides/welcome-page.tsx and served via the reroute plugin — the app's original welcome-page.tsx is never modified.

showSignIn.description: Show the 'Joining a team? Sign in' link. Default false.

title.description: Hero title. Omit to fall back to the app's i18n string.

subtitle.description: Hero subtitle. Omit to fall back to the app's i18n string.

getStartedHeading.description: Heading above the numbered steps. Default 'Get started'.

getStartedLabel.description: Primary button label. Omit to fall back to the app's i18n string.

showcaseTitle.description: Heading for the right-hand showcase panel, one array entry per line.

features.description: Feature cards in the showcase panel.
